snippet.title: PSG 0-1 Bayern Munich. ¬°PARTIDAZO! Neymar, Mbapp√© y Keylor eliminan al CAMPE√ìN. | Champions League
snippet.description: En un partido de idas y vueltas, el PSG pudo asegurar su boleto a las semifinales de la UEFA Champions League. El Bayern Munich termin√≥ ganando de visita 1-0, pero no le alcanz√≥ por el 3-2 conseguido por el Paris Saint-Germain en el juego de ida. Neymar lider√≥ el ataque parisino, jugando un partido excelente al cual solo le falt√≥ su gol. El Tico Keylor Navas fue nuevamente clave en limitar a los alemanes a un solo gol. El Bayern es el tercer campe√≥n consecutivo en quedarse eliminado antes de las semis en la Liga de Campeones. El PSG, avanz√≥ a las semifinales por tercera vez en su historia. #ChampionsLeague | PSG vs Bayern Munich

No ser√° un funeral de estado, una petici√≥n hecha por el mismo duque pero la ceremonia s√≠ ser√° retransmitida por la televisi√≥n. snippet.title: Justin Bieber - Live from Paris (Livestream)
snippet.description:
Against the breathtaking backdrop of the City Of Lights, and from the lush ruins of a vacant but majestic Parisian hotel, Justin Bieber brings his new album Justice to life with five stunning performances, four of them live debuts. This fifteen minute special brings fans directly into Justin‚Äôs world and opens the doors to his powerful new album.

snippet.title: Chonkers Off-Road Tires Arrive To The Fortnite Island
snippet.description:
Built for handling the toughest driving conditions, Chonkers Off-Road Tires make getting around off road easier in any vehicle.

The Chonkers Off-Road Tires are the first Mod to arrive to the Fortnite Island. These tires are perfect for when you want to take the scenic route but don't want to sacrifice the smooth ride of your current vehicle. Find these tires on the ground or even in some tire piles around the Island.

Hop in, grab a pair of Chonkers Off-Road Tires and take it off road!

#FortniteChonkers #ChonkersOffRoadTires #Fortnite

snippet.description:

This theme pays homage to both modern and feudal Japanese aesthetics, which you'll be able to see clearly displayed in our Battle Pass, season release trailer, and more.

Share your love of Louis Vuitton's quality goods with your child via the Maison Vivienne Dollhouse. Meant as a collector's piece, it has a multi-room, multi-color dwelling on the inside, complete with miniature Courrier Lozine and Wardrobe trunks, chairs, and more, all of which store inside an inner trunk with dedicated storage compartments. Two Vivienne dolls are included, with heads that recall the company's iconic Monogram print, and the entire thing is housed in a nearly foot and a half tall trunk with a Monogram canvas exterior, natural cowhide leather handles, and brass metallic pieces.

Una vez que le mont√© la voz todos me dec√≠an: esta canci√≥n a d√∫o  con Juan Luis ser√≠a espectacular.

snippet.title: la triste historia de Enrique Guzman | Alberto Vazquez Lo Advirtio | Documental
snippet.description:
Enrique Guzm√°n (Caracas, Venezuela, 1 de febrero de 1943) es un cantante mexicano, nacido en Venezuela.‚Äã En los a√±os 60 fue uno de los cantantes m√°s populares de M√©xico.

Fue vocalista de Los Teen Tops, uno de los primeros grupos en tocar Rock and roll en M√©xico. Se le promov√≠a como ¬´√≠dolo de la juventud¬ª y uno de los ¬´grandes del rock¬ª (junto con Ang√©lica Mar√≠a, C√©sar Costa, Julissa, Johnny Laboriel, Manolo Mu√±oz, Alberto V√°zquez y otros).

Hijo de Jaime Guzm√°n Esparza y de Elena Vargas, aunque naci√≥ en Caracas (Venezuela), sus padres le otorgaron la nacionalidad mexicana por nacimiento‚Äã registr√°ndolo en la embajada mexicana. Vivi√≥ en Venezuela hasta la edad de 12 a√±os.

Comenz√≥ su carrera participando en las fiestas familiares y en las actividades de la escuela, sirviendo incluso de acompa√±amiento a artistas como Sergio Bustamante.

En 1957, con solo 14 a√±os, Guzm√°n practicaba patinaje en el Deportivo Chapultepec (en la Ciudad de M√©xico). All√≠ conoci√≥ a los hermanos Jes√∫s y Armando Mart√≠nez. Entre paseo y paseo en patines ( literalmente les patinaba el coco)  surgi√≥ la idea de conformar un grupo musical con Guzm√°n, los hermanos Mart√≠nez y Sergio Martell. Pusieron a su banda de rock el nombre de Los Teen Tops. Inicialmente Guzm√°n era el bajista del grupo, pero debido a que el cantante (Armando) se enferm√≥ de la garganta en su primera intervenci√≥n en un programa de radio, Guzm√°n tuvo que tomar su lugar, a partir de entonces el cambio fue definitivo.

En el primer disco que grabaron venia  La plaga por un lado y El rock de la c√°rcel, por el otro, que resultaban ser adaptaciones al espa√±ol de las canciones Good Golly Miss Molly, de Little Richard y Jailhouse Rock, de Elvis Presley. Pero estas versiones al espa√±ol fueron un gran √©xito. Para esa epoca todas las abuelas yeye movian el bote, al ritmo del rock and roll.

Confidente de secundaria
Buen rock esta noche
Lucila
Muchacho triste y solitario

En 1961 Enrique Guzm√°n grab√≥ como solista ‚Äîya sin Los Teen Tops‚Äî su primer disco. Incluy√≥ 100 kilos de barro (A Hundred Pounds of Clay) en calidad de solista, con la orquesta y coros de Chuck Anderson. Dado el √©xito que tuvo como solista, vendr√≠an otras grabaciones como "Mi coraz√≥n canta", "Tu cabeza en mi hombro" ambos √©xitos de Paul Anka, con lo cual grab√≥ su primer LP en solitario, ocupando los primeros lugares de listas de √©xitos en Am√©rica Latina, siendo considerado el cantante de Am√©rica. Posteriores grabaciones lo confirmar√≠an dado que melod√≠a que grababa, era un √©xito seguro.

Estudi√≥ en la facultad de Medicina de la Universidad Nacional Aut√≥noma de M√©xico, aunque no termin√≥ su carrera.

snippet.description:

Aunque solo es una 125cc como pesa tan poco corre un monton, y es super agil, creo que podria ser de lo mas divertido que tengo. 


‚ñ∫ Enlaces:

* Mi casco es el tipico de 30‚Ç¨ y lo mejor seria uno integral, pero aun no he encontrado uno que tenga la misma visibilidad que uno abierto y pese poco (escucho ideas)

snippet.title: Twenty One Pilots - Shy Away (Official Video)
snippet.description:
Twenty One Pilots - Shy Away (Official Video)
Twenty One Pilots official video for "Shy Away" from the forthcoming album Scaled And Icy, available May 21st on Fueled By Ramen.

Twenty One Pilots - Livestream Experience
May 21 @ 8PM ET / 5PM PT
Tickets available at http://live.twentyonepilots.com 

Stream / Download "Shy Away" - https://top.lnk.to/SAI
Pre-order / Pre-Save Scaled And Icy - https://top.lnk.to/SAI

Directed by Miles Cable & AJ Favicchio

LYRICS
When I get home,
You better not be there
We're placing bets you won't
Shed your modesty
And the only thing to leave behind
Is your own skin on the floor

Don't you shy away
Manifest a ceiling when you shy away
Searching for that feeling
Just like an 'I Love You'
That isn't words
Like a song he wrote
that's never heard
Don't you shh...

When you get home
You barely recognize the pictures they
put in a frame
'Cause you shed your modesty
Don't circle the track
Take what you have
and leave your skin on the floor.

Don't you shy away
Manifest a ceiling when you shy away
Searching for that feeling
Just like an 'I Love You'
That isn't words
Like a song he wrote
that's never heard

When I get home
Boy, you better not be there
You're long gone
Shed your modesty
Don't circle the track
Just break the cycle in half
and leave your skin on the floor.

Don't you shy away
Manifest a ceiling when you shy away
Searching for that feeling
Just like an 'I Love You'
That isn't words
Like a song he wrote
that's never heard

that's never heard...

an 'I Love You'
That isn't words
Like a song he wrote
that's never heard

Don't you shy away.

Download NOW!! ‚ñ∫‚ñ∫ https://supr.cl/playbrawl
Be a BRAWLER! Subscribe! ‚ñ∫‚ñ∫ https://supr.cl/subscribe

#GoldarmGang #Brawlstars #Belle

Fast-paced 3v3 multiplayer and battle royale made for mobile! Play with friends or solo across a variety of game modes in under three minutes.

Unlock and upgrade dozens of Brawlers with powerful Super abilities, Star Powers and Gadgets! Collect unique skins to stand out and show off. Battle in a variety of mysterious locations within the Brawliverse!

BATTLE IN MULTIPLE GAME MODES
- Gem Grab (3v3): Team up and out-strategize the opposing team. Collect and hold 10 gems to win, but get fragged and lose your gems.
- Showdown (Solo/Duo): A battle royale style fight for survival. Collect power ups for your Brawler. Grab a friend or play solo - be the last Brawler standing in the rowdiest battle royale yet. Winner take all!
- Brawl Ball (3v3): It's a whole new Brawl game! Show off your soccer/football skills and score two goals before the other team. There are no red cards here.
- Bounty (3v3): Take out opponents to earn stars, but don‚Äôt let them pick you off. The squad with the most stars wins the match!
- Heist (3v3): Protect your team‚Äôs safe and try to crack open your opponents‚Äô. Navigate the map to sneak, blast and blow your way clear to the enemies treasure.
- Special Events: Limited time special PvE and PvP game modes.
- Championship Challenge: Join Brawl Stars' esports scene with in-game qualifiers!

UNLOCK AND UPGRADE BRAWLERS
Collect and upgrade a variety of Brawlers with powerful Super abilities, Star Powers and Gadgets! Level them up and collect unique skins.

BRAWL PASS
Complete quests, open Brawl Boxes, earn Gems, pins and an exclusive Brawl Pass skin! Fresh content every season.

BECOME THE STAR PLAYER
Climb the local and regional leaderboards to prove you‚Äôre the greatest Brawler of them all!

CONSTANTLY EVOLVING
Look out for new Brawlers, skins, maps, special events and games modes in the future.

PLEASE NOTE! Brawl Stars is free to download and play, however, some game items can also be purchased for real money. If you don't want to use this feature, please disable in-app purchases in your device's settings. Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 9 years of age to play or download Brawl Stars.

Features:
- Team up for real-time 3v3 battles against players from across the world
- A fast-paced multiplayer battle royale mode made for mobile
- Unlock and collect new, powerful Brawlers - each with a signature attack and Super ability
- New events and game modes daily
- Battle solo or with friends
- Climb to the top of the leaderboards in global and local rankings 
- Join or start your own Club with fellow players to share tips and battle together
- Customize Brawlers with unlockable skins
- Player-designed maps offer challenging new terrain to master

From the makers of Clash of Clans, Clash Royale and Boom Beach!

Support:
Contact us in-game via Settings, Help and Support ‚Äî or visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/brawl-stars/

Privacy Policy:
http://supercell.com/en/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
http://supercell.com/en/terms-of-service/

Parent's Guide:
http://supercell.com/en/parents/

snippet.title: Apex Legends War Games Event Trailer
snippet.description:
Shall we play a game? The new War Games Event features five rotating takeover modes with never-before-seen modifiers, a new rewards track, and new skins.  

Maggie warned the Legends what would happen if they didn‚Äôt deliver Fuse to her. Now she‚Äôs following through on her threat. Say goodbye to your precious games -- Salvo‚Äôs War Games are here instead. Play five rotating limited-time takeovers over two weeks. Shields regenerate in Shield Regen, round time is reduced whenever a Legend dies in Killing Time, automatically retrieve fallen banners in Auto Banners, compete for top loot in Ultra Zones, and get a free respawn in Second Chance. Plus check out the store to get bold new cosmetics. Everybody loves a little Mayhem -- get out there and make Maggie proud. 

Apex Legends‚Ñ¢ is a free-to-play battle royale game where legendary characters battle for glory, fame, and fortune on the fringes of the Frontier. Play for free now on PlayStation¬Æ 4, PlayStation 5, Xbox One, Xbox Series X|S, Nintendo Switch, and PC via Origin and Steam.  

Learn more about Apex Legends Season 8 ‚Äì Mayhem: http://x.ea.com/67416
 
Check out our YouTube channel: http://x.ea.com/56710.
Follow us on Twitter: https://twitter.com/playapex.
Follow us on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/playapex/.

#WarGames #ApexSeason8 #ApexSeason8 #ApexLegends

nl-NL.title: Apex Legends War Games Event-trailer
nl-NL.description:
Zullen we een spelletje spelen? Het nieuwe War Games Event bevat vijf roulerende takeover modes met nog nooit eerder geziene modifiers, een nieuw beloningenpad en nieuwe skins.  

Maggie waarschuwde de Legends voor wat er zou gebeuren als ze Fuse niet bij haar afleverden. Nu komt ze haar belofte na. Zeg maar dag tegen je kostbare games: je krijgt nu te maken met Salvo's War Games. Speel twee weken lang vijf roulerende tijdelijke takeovers. Schilden herstellen in Shield Regen, de rondetijd wordt verkort als een Legend doodgaat in Killing Time, haal automatisch gevallen banieren op in Auto Banners, speel voor de beste loot in Ultra Zones en krijg een gratis respawn in Second Chance. En ga naar de store om vette nieuwe cosmetische items te krijgen. Iedereen houdt wel van een beetje chaos: stort je in de strijd en maak Maggie trots. 

Apex Legends‚Ñ¢ is een free-to-play battle royale-spel waarin legendarische personages strijden om glorie, roem en fortuin aan de rand van de Frontier. Speel nu gratis op de PlayStation¬Æ4, PlayStation¬Æ5, Xbox One, Xbox Series X|S, Nintendo Switch en pc via Origin en Steam.

pt-PT.description:
Vamos jogar? O novo Evento War Games tem cinco modos de takeover rotativos, modificadores nunca antes vistos, uma nova tabela de recompensas e novos visuais.  

Maggie avisou as Lendas do que aconteceria se n√£o lhe entregassem Fuse. Agora vai cumprir. Digam adeus aos vossos preciosos jogos. Est√° na hora dos War Games de Salvo. Joga cinco modos de takeover rotativos ao longo de duas semanas. Em Shield Regen os escudos regeneram; em Killing Time o tempo de ronda diminui sempre que uma lenda morre; em Auto Banners as faixas s√£o automaticamente recolhidas; Ultra Loot deixa-te competir por saque de topo; por fim, Second Chance d√°-te uma recoloca√ß√£o gr√°tis. Al√©m disso podes encontrar novos e fant√°sticos itens cosm√©ticos na loja. Toda a gente gosta de um pouco de caos. Deixa a Maggie orgulhosa.

Fue resultado hilaridad cuando quise hacerlos llorar, es cierto, 
en el camino sali√≥ algo mal
Fue mi torpe condici√≥n, de hecho sal√≠ campe√≥n, es cierto, 
en el camino hice algo incorrecto

Tal vez deber√≠a hacer algo al respecto, o tal vez dejar que se acabe el trayecto

Suma todo lo que sabes sobre todo lo que soy
T√∫ no temas, el producto no es un error
Multiplica la constante o divide la fracci√≥n
Ese signo negativo est√° en lo correcto

De perdido tu destierro te ha brindado un receso, es cierto, 
sintonizabas un buen canal
Las sustancias y el rencor ahogaron ese resplandor y muerto 
tal vez ya deje de hacer lo incorrecto

Tal vez deber√≠a hojear el manifiesto o tal vez me hace falta un poco de afecto

Suma todo lo que sabes sobre todo lo que soy

Multiplica la constante o divide la fracci√≥n
Ese signo negativo est√° en lo correcto
No importa el coeficiente fuera de proporci√≥n
Ni que el equivalente sea superior
Se me rompe la cabeza, no encuentro soluci√≥n
